headline: 2026 NFL draft: Latest Cleveland Browns updates, intel, buzz
description: The Browns have two first-round picks and nine total selections in the 2026 draft. Here's the latest on what Cleveland might do.

headline: 5 Ohio St. players, Ty Simpson among 16 to attend NFL draft
description: Five Ohio State players are among the 16 planning to attend the first round of the NFL draft on April 23 in Pittsburgh, a group that doesn't include Fernando Mendoza but does include fellow QB Ty Simpson.

headline: 2026 NFL draft: Latest Pittsburgh Steelers updates, intel, buzz
description: The Steelers have the No. 21 pick in Round 1 and 12 total selections in the 2026 draft. Here's the latest on what Pittsburgh might do.

headline: 2026 NFL draft: Latest Washington Commanders updates, intel, buzz
description: The Commanders are set to pick early in Round 1 and have six total selections in the 2026 NFL draft. Here's the latest on what Washington might do once it is on the clock.

headline: 2026 NFL draft: Denver Broncos updates, intel, buzz
description: The Broncos are set to pick No. 62 and have seven total selections in the 2026 draft. Here's the latest on what Denver might do.

headline: 2026 NFL draft: Atlanta Falcons updates, intel, buzz
description: The Falcons are set to pick No. 48 and have five total selections in the 2026 draft. Here's the latest on what Atlanta might do.

headline: Saquon Barkley: ‘I’m a big fan’ of Jeremiyah Love

headline: 2026 NFL draft full order: AFC, NFC team picks in all rounds
description: The order for all seven rounds of the 2026 NFL draft is set, starting with the Raiders at No. 1 and ending with the Broncos at No. 257.

headline: 2026 NFL draft: Latest New York Giants updates, intel, buzz

headline: 2026 NFL draft: Latest New England Patriots updates, intel, buzz

headline: 2026 NFL draft: Experts pick superteams of top prospects

headline: 2026 NFL draft: Latest intel, questions for 32 teams' picks
description: Our NFL reporters answer questions for every team two weeks out from the draft, and our analysts weigh in with some new intel on picks and moves.

headline: Commanders still putting pieces around Jayden Daniels
description: After addressing tight end and offensive line, Washington appears headed toward drafting receivers for Jayden Daniels.

headline: Broncos used to not having first-round picks in NFL draft
description: The Jaylen Waddle trade leaves the Broncos in a familiar position, but the past two drafts without a Round 1 pick didn't go so bad.
